title: Why ANSEM Went Up Yesterday
summary: The Black Bull was one of the strongest crypto movers yesterday, gaining 111.4% over 24 hours while attracting active market participation.
reasons: The token ranked among the strongest 24-hour gainers with a 111.4% move.
Roughly $87M in 24-hour trading volume suggests active short-term participation.
The move may reflect renewed momentum interest as traders rotated into recent outperformers.
